text.title: Cost-Model Spreadsheet Template Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Cost-Model Spreadsheet Template methodology end-to-end. Each step declares input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: decompose-architecture
step.action: Map every architecture component to standard line items in 5 categories (Compute / Storage / Network / Operations / Buffer).
step.output: Line table with zero-volume rows present
step.decision-gate: If a category is empty, mark all rows zero — never omit.

step.name: populate-volumes-from-assumptions
step.action: Fill volume column linking to Assumptions tab; volumes derived from req/sec * 86400 * 30 or equivalent.
step.decision-gate: Direct hardcoded volumes without source link rejected.

step.name: source-unit-rates
step.action: Look up unit cost per line from per-cloud-rates files (last_updated <90 days) or provider calculator with URL.

step.name: compute-scenarios
step.action: Compute Conservative (0.5x) / Expected / Aggressive (2x) scenarios from the same line table.

step.name: attach-buffer-and-signoff
step.action: Add Buffer line (10-15%) with policy note; attach signoff block.
